images.alt: Dark-toned abstract realist oil painting with sculptural expressionist brushwork and layered visible paint texture. Diffused cool lighting, soft shadows, muted palette, and fluid tonal transitions create depth and motion. Full-length portrait of a neo-aristocrat from the “Threshold Break” era, reclining on a transparent floating gel lounger threaded with bioluminescent cyan veins. Ethereal bio-silk attire with neural-lace embroidery, magnetic levitating sleeve petals, iridescent blue-violet sash, and subtle decorative subdermal circuitry. Intricate neuro-interface braids woven with glowing memory-thread and dormant digital rosebuds. Holding a closed luminous fan made of recycled orbital carbon fiber. Background features a climate-controlled terrace, vertical gardens, distant arcology spires, and the faint curve of an orbital ring in a pale sky. Soft daylight filtered through electromagnetic dust. Visible oil brushstrokes mixed with subtle digital glitch artifacts, chromatic aberration highlights, and rich textures of living gel, bio-silk, and memory-thread. Atmosphere of cold elegance, post-romantic futurism, and aristocratic leisure after the singularity. Gainsborough-inspired mood with cinematic sci-fi surrealism.

record.text:
There is a lot being written about the stylistic tells of AI writing (em-dashes, etc.) but this paper looks at AI narrative tells instead.

Fascinating differences between AI & human narrative, and asking AI to write in different styles doesn't do much to change it arxiv.org/abs/2604.03136

Was just re-reading Lem's Golem XIV (from 1981) .

I realized it has an illustration of what we would call the jagged frontier as explained by an AI, Golem (GENERAL OPERATOR, LONG-RANGE, ETHICALLY STABILIZED, MULTIMODELING), discussing itself and a smarter AI (Honest Annie) compared to people!

Thick painterly brushstrokes, layered textures, sculptural forms, and atmospheric depth. Cool diffused lighting with soft shadows and cinematic fog. A solitary flute player sits on a jagged rocky outcrop in a mist-covered wasteland, wearing layered weathered leather and roughspun fabrics with muted olive and dark blue tones, scarf, bracers, and worn sandals. Windswept hair, focused posture, playing a carved wooden flute. The terrain is filled with dark stone formations, patches of moss, pale grass, and scattered ferns. Ethereal translucent figures drift through the distant fog, adding an eerie supernatural presence. Centered composition, moody and foreboding atmosphere, dramatic painterly texture, dark fantasy aesthetic, highly detailed environmental storytelling.

防御呪文で使用すると敵を攻撃した時のギルのHPの減りが2分の1になり、消費MPは1です。最初から覚えてる呪文で序盤戦では結構頼りになります。序盤の騎士系の敵を相手にする時に使うことになると思います

ゲームキャラ擬人化第1606回　スペランカー2勇者への挑戦　エスパー
3人の主人公の一人で、体力、徳が低くてもてるアイテム数も少ないと一見弱そうに見えますが体力を消費して使う超能力が強力で、さらにESPという設置しておいてから再び使うと設置した場所まで一瞬で戻れる特技が便利です。とりあえず探検家以外の二人は強いので好みでどっちか選ぶといいんじゃないかと思います。ちなみにスペランカー先生で先生が見る夢の中でも登場しますね（他の2主人公も登場してますがなんかこれの印象がつよいです）😅
#aiart

ゲームキャラ擬人化第1605回　スペランカー2勇者への挑戦　聖職者
今作の主人公の一人でなぜ聖職者が？というツッコミが入りそうです。体力が少なく徳の最大値が高いのが特徴で、体力を使うことで敵の動きを止めることもできます。通常時は杖で、ロザリオはアンデットを唯一倒せるのでここら辺は聖職者が有利ですが、さらにボス戦でしか使えないオーラを使うとボスが一瞬で溶けると冒険家とは比べものにならないほど強いです

#generativeAI #google #epicurious #citation #weredoomed

images.alt:
Google:  Do not weary of drinking, eating, getting intoxicated and making love! Make holiday! 

Al Overview

Cheers to that! It's an excellent philosophy, and if you are looking to put it into action

right here in Le Plateau-Mont-Royal, you have some of the best food, drinks, and

nightlife in the city right outside your door.

Here is a quick guide to making the most of your holiday in the neighborhood:

+ Epicurean Feasting: For stellar BYOB dining, grab a table at L'Avenue on Mont-
Royal for an unforgettable brunch, or head to Schwartz's Deli (just a short walk
south) for Montreal's legendary smoked meat.

+ Drink & Get Intoxicated: The Plateau is famous for its vibrant bar scene. Sip world-
class cocktails at L'Gros Luxe, grab a local Quebec craft pint at Vices & Versa on
Saint-Laurent, or enjoy a cozy, intimate vibe at Le Lab.

+ Make Holiday: Take a romantic or leisurely stroll up to the lookout at Mount Royal
Park to watch the sunset, then wander the shaded paths of La Fontaine Park.

Always pace yourself, and enjoy the holiday!
